query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.quotationId, q.quotationNumber, q.createdAt as quotationCreatedAt, q.validUntil
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id
WHERE p.id = 390001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.quotationId, q.quotationNumber, q.createdAt as quotationCreatedAt, q.validUntil
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id
WHERE p.id = 390001;
